### `@tobiu` commented on 2023-02-17T21:28:43Z

thx deniz!

one thought: in case a child process breaks (not returning 0), should the main process stop right away or should all other CPs still run? not sure on this one :)

---

### `@deniztoprak` commented on 2023-02-19T21:10:47Z

That's what I was thinking. Continuing the build process is useless, once a build step is failing. It just wastes time/energy. Check out the #4072.
